inside raw text DOES end the element, even inside CSS strings. So we avoid literal in the content. */ .foo::before { content: '<\/style>'; } h1 { font-size: 2em; } inside a string should NOT end the block var x = ''; function hello() { document.title = "Hello"; if (x < 10 && y > 5) { return true; } } /* Multi-line comment with inside */

Script and Style Test

The script and style blocks above contain fake tags that should NOT appear in the DOM.
